notes: Refers to both a competitive event/contest and the general concept of competition (e.g. in business).

sentences.german: Sie hat an einem Wettbewerb für junge Musiker teilgenommen.
sentences.english: She took part in a competition for young musicians.

sentences.german: Der Wettbewerb zwischen den Unternehmen ist sehr hart.
sentences.english: The competition between the companies is very fierce.
